final:
module SRAM (
    input wire [7:0] data_in,
    input wire we, // Write enable
    input wire clk,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);
    reg [7:0] obf_memory;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            obf_memory <= data_in; // Write data to obf_memory
        end
        data_out <= obf_memory; // Output stored data
    end
endmodule
